summary.title: Demo Threat Model
summary.description: A sample model of a web application, with a queue-decoupled background process.

detail._note: Source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OWASP/threat-dragon/main/ThreatDragonModels/demo-threat-model.json (fetched 2026-05-16). Used here as a real-world reference to benchmark ATMS coverage vs. a hand-authored Threat Dragon model. 7 elements (1 actor, 2 processes, 4 stores), 12 data flows, 3 trust boundaries, 14 hand-authored threats.
